summary: Split into static landing page at / and React PWA at /app/. Vite base='/app/', SW scoped to /app/, manifest start_url+scope updated, icons regenerated from p-lens-icon.png source.
techStack: React 18 + Vite 5 PWA, React Router v7, Tailwind CSS v3, Dexie.js v4, jsPDF, Claude Haiku 4.5, Nominatim, Web Speech API
recentChanges: index.html: manifest and favicon links made relative (no leading slash)
public/manifest.json: start_url='/app/', scope='/app/', icon paths updated to /app/icons/...
public/sw.js: PRECACHE and path handlers scoped to /app/, cache version bumped to pl-shell-v2
src/main.jsx: SW registered at /app/sw.js with scope /app/
vercel.json: rewrite scoped to /app/ only (landing page served as static dist/index.html)
generate-icons.cjs: rewritten to resize p-lens-icon.png via canvas loadImage into 192/512/32px PNGs
landing/index.html: static dark-theme landing page created
scripts/copy-landing.js: postbuild copies landing to dist/index.html
package.json: build script appends '&& node scripts/copy-landing.js'
blockers: Google Maps Places: needs GCloud billing + referrer config before switching from Nominatim
Anthropic key needs server-side proxy before production
nextSteps: Deploy to Vercel and verify /app/ loads PWA, / loads landing page
Add favicon to landing page (copy from /app/icons/favicon.png or host at root)
Test PWA install prompt from /app/ on mobile
